theme_tagline: One match from glory. One spin from gold.
primary_hook: FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinal — England vs Argentina, 3PM ET, Atlanta Stadium
secondary_hook: World Cup Final countdown — final is Sunday July 19 at MetLife Stadium; Shakira & Burna Boy 'Dai Dai' viral dance dominating football content
trending_topic_details: World Cup semifinal day dominates all platforms. England vs Argentina kicks off 3PM ET on FOX at Atlanta Stadium. The 'Dai Dai' song/dance (Shakira x Burna Boy) has 5.3M+ TikTok posts. Final lands July 19 at MetLife — first 48-team tournament.
content_angle: Lady E Luck is the VIP box for semifinal day — every player is one kick from glory, and the Golden Hour is our extra time.
deals_hook: Golden Boot Jackpot (all day): biggest recharge wins a multiplier bonus — 'Score the biggest. Win the boot.'
Hat Trick Bonus (3PM-6PM match window): 3 recharges during match hours = stacked bonus — 'Three times. Three wins.'
Penalty Kick Free Spin (referral): share code, friend joins, both get a free spin bonus — 'Pass it. They score. You both win.'
Halftime Reload (10PM-Midnight): mystery midnight drop for active players — 'The second half always surprises.'
avoid: national rivalries framed negatively (keep England/Argentina banter light and neutral)
real team logos, player names, or FIFA trademarks in images
